claimText: For PGR summative assessment (transfer, confirmation, thesis), the following AI uses are permitted without declaration: local editing tools (grammar assistants, spell-checkers, code debuggers making small local changes); AI for background research, language translation, bibliography creation, and general subject understanding; and AI for coding where coding serves a research purpose but is not the substantive output. Students remain responsible for correctness of any code used.

citation.citationTitle: Generative AI Use — Mathematical, Physical and Life Sciences Division
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
